title: Multiview Diffusion Model Training
description: Training a base multiview diffusion model including loss computation and batch sampling across multiple camera views with context parallelism support.

actors.name: Trainer
actors.description: Orchestrates the training loop via cosmos_predict1.utils.trainer.Trainer; drives forward/loss/backward cycles

actors.name: DataLoader
actors.description: Supplies data_batch dicts with keys 'video' (input_data_key) and 'images_1024' (input_image_key)

actors.name: ConfigurationSystem
actors.description: Instantiates MultiviewModelConfig (n_views=6) and Config via make_config(); registers experiment groups

actors.name: ParallelStateManager
actors.description: Megatron parallel_state; manages context-parallel (CP) and tensor-parallel (TP) groups

actors.name: VAE
actors.description: Encodes/decodes latents; called as self.vae.encode() / self.vae.decode() per-view

actors.name: Conditioner
actors.description: Produces condition/uncondition CosmosCondition objects via get_condition_uncondition() or get_condition_with_negative_prompt()

use_cases.name: Configure Multiview Model
use_cases.description: Instantiate MultiviewModelConfig(n_views=6) extending DefaultModelConfig; set VAE, conditioner, net (MultiviewGeneralDIT), EMA, EDMSDE, sigma_data=0.5, latent_shape=[16,24,44,80], loss_reduce='sum'

use_cases.name: Initialize MultiviewDiffusionModel
use_cases.description: Construct MultiviewDiffusionModel(config): calls super().__init__(config) [DiffusionModel], sets self.n_views from config.n_views

use_cases.name: Initialize MultiviewGeneralDIT Network
use_cases.description: Construct MultiviewGeneralDIT: extends GeneralDIT; reinitializes self.blocks as nn.ModuleDict with GeneralDITTransformerBlock(n_views=n_views); adds view_embeddings=nn.Embedding(n_views, view_condition_dim); optionally adds traj_embeddings, repeat_frame_embedding; calls build_patch_embed() and build_pos_embed()

use_cases.name: Encode Multiview State
use_cases.description: Rearrange B C (V T) H W → (B V) C T H W, call VAE encode per-view batch, rescale by sigma_data, rearrange back to B C (V T) H W

use_cases.name: Decode Multiview Latent
use_cases.description: Rearrange latent to (B V) C T H W, call VAE decode(latent/sigma_data) per-view, rearrange back

use_cases.name: Compute Training Loss
use_cases.description: For image batch: disable CP. For video batch with CP>1: enable CP, split x0/epsilon along temporal dim per view using split_inputs_cp(). Calls grandparent (VideoModel).compute_loss_with_epsilon_and_sigma(). For sum-loss with CP: scale kendall_loss by CP world size. Returns (output_batch, kendall_loss, pred_mse, edm_loss).
use_cases.branching: is_image_batch → CP off; video + CP world size > 1 → split x0/epsilon per view

use_cases.name: Generate Training Samples
use_cases.description: Normalize data, detect image vs video batch, build x0_fn, generate noise x_sigma_max (arch_invariant_rand * sde.sigma_max). If CP enabled: split x_sigma_max per view. Run sampler(x0_fn, x_sigma_max, num_steps, sigma_max, solver_option). If CP enabled: cat_outputs_cp per view. Return samples.
key_methods: MultiviewDiffusionModel.generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance=1.5, seed, state_shape, n_sample, num_steps=35, solver_option='2ab')

use_cases.name: Build Denoising Function (x0_fn)
use_cases.description: Get condition/uncondition from conditioner. Broadcast to TP/CP groups. Return closure x0_fn(noise_x, sigma): computes cond_x0=denoise(noise_x,sigma,condition).x0, uncond_x0=denoise(...,uncondition).x0, applies classifier-free guidance: raw_x0 = cond_x0 + guidance*(cond_x0-uncond_x0). Optional inpainting via guided_image/guided_mask replacement trick.
use_cases.guidance_modes: standard CFG; dual-guidance (guidance + guidance_other for trajectory); inpainting replacement

use_cases.name: Prepare Embedded Sequence (Forward Pre-Block)
use_cases.description: Concatenate optional padding mask. Generate view_embeddings (nn.Embedding) for [0..V-1]. Optionally add repeat_frame_embedding. Optionally concat traj_emb. Rearrange to B C V T H W, concat view embedding channel-wise, rearrange back. Apply x_embedder (PatchEmbed). Compute RoPE pos embedding via MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb. Compute extra_pos_emb via MultiviewSinCosPosEmbAxis.

use_cases.name: Execute DIT Forward Pass
use_cases.description: forward_before_blocks(): call prepare_embedded_sequence(), t_embedder(timesteps), prepare_additional_timestamp_embedder(), affline_norm(). Rearrange for THWBD or BTHWD format. Optionally scatter for sequence parallelism. Returns dict with x, affline_emb_B_D, crossattn_emb, crossattn_mask, rope_emb, adaln_lora, original_shape, extra_pos_emb.
key_methods: MultiviewGeneralDIT.forward_before_blocks(x, timesteps, crossattn_emb, crossattn_mask, fps, image_size, padding_mask, data_type, ...)

use_cases.name: FSDP-Wrapped Model Training
use_cases.description: FSDPDiffusionModel(MultiviewDiffusionModel) decorated by @diffusion_fsdp_class_decorator; pass-through class enabling FSDP sharding. Config: FSDPConfig(policy='block', sharding_group_size=8, sharding_strategy='full').
key_methods: FSDPDiffusionModel (no new methods, inherits all from MultiviewDiffusionModel)

relationships: UC3 includes UC9 (prepare_embedded_sequence called in forward_before_blocks)
UC6 uses split_inputs_cp from context_parallel module
UC7 uses cat_outputs_cp from context_parallel module

include_extend_relationships.label: loss uses same CP split logic

important_notes: n_views in MultiviewDiffusionModel is used to rearrange B C (V T) H W ↔ (B V) C T H W for per-view VAE ops
Context parallelism (CP) splits the temporal dimension per view; only enabled for video batches, not image batches
MultiviewGeneralDIT reinitializes self.blocks as nn.ModuleDict (not list) with optional layer_mask to skip blocks
view_embeddings (learnable nn.Embedding) are concatenated channel-wise to the latent before PatchEmbed
pos_emb_cls must be 'rope3d' for multiview → uses MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb + MultiviewSinCosPosEmbAxis
extra_per_block_abs_pos_emb must be True in MultiviewGeneralDIT; uses 'sincos' type
FSDPDiffusionModel is a pass-through class decorated at class definition time for FSDP wrapping
Dual guidance (guidance_other) supported for inference-time trajectory guidance; not usable with parallel_state
Inpainting supported via guided_image/guided_mask replacement trick in x0_fn
